items.block_reason: Official public download returns a Google Drive sign-in page instead of a usable executive order PDF.
items.next_action: Request a valid official copy from the Governor's Office or State Archives, archive it through manual source intake, then rerun the EO source-anchoring workflow.

items.block_reason: Live LegiScan bill refresh requires LEGISCAN_API_KEY, and that environment variable is not configured in this session.
items.next_action: Configure LEGISCAN_API_KEY, then run the LegiScan current-session or all-session refresh and rebuild the legislation layer.

boundary: This queue preserves blocked download work for later retry or official manual replacement. It does not authorize non-official replacement sources.
